label: source_file
description: Source PDF filename used to align the extracted row with the input document.

label: catalyst
description: Catalyst name or sample label mentioned in the synthetic note.

label: feedstock
description: Main feedstock or reactant used in the synthetic reaction note.

label: reaction_temperature
description: Reaction temperature with unit as stated in the synthetic note.

label: reaction_pressure
description: Reaction pressure with unit as stated in the synthetic note.

label: conversion
description: Reported conversion value from the synthetic note.

label: selectivity
description: Reported selectivity value from the synthetic note.

label: main_product
description: Main product mentioned in the synthetic note.

label: notes
description: Short note that the row is synthetic and for demonstration only.
